calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-29-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roger Gross appeared by zoom for Lauren Carpenter.

Mr. Gross stated that they are waiving issues one (Claim for Reimbursement of Funeral Expenses) and issue two (Claim for Reimbursement of Airfare Expenses) that were raised in the Examiner's notes. The Court raised the issue of all of the money being kept in one bank account exceeding the FDIC limit, stated that the Executor really needs to pay attention to this and raised the issue of the possibility of something going wrong with the financial institution and the estate funds not being insured for the full amount. The Court also stated that the preliminary distribution to Beneficiary Donna Francesconi made without prior Court authority is not permitted and that Mr. Gross needs to speak to his Client about that. Mr. Gross stated that when the funds were deposited, they were not anticipating it taking so long to get before the Court and that issue of the preliminary distribution is noted. Mr. Gross also stated that the date of death of the Decedent is incorrect, that he indicated the date as December 26, 2017, but the date of death is December 29, 2017, that he does not know how the error happened and that he is prepared to do whatever is necessary to correct it. The Court noted that the Probate Examiner has referenced December 29, 2017 as the date of death. The Petition for Final Distribution on First and Final Account, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-10-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Roger Gross for Petitioner.

Mr. Gross stated that between the holidays and illness things got delayed, that he is prepared to file a petition for final distribution to be finalized and signed within 30 days.
The Report of Status of Administration is off calendar.

Status on filing a petition for final distribution is set for March 23, 2020.

Judge: Joeseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.
